column2: Transition Month to new strategy. The main goal is to reach 350 leads per month. The highest value of conversion action is Phone Calls (because of highest quality). Those actions on Google are set to only track when 60 seconds of the call have been completed. In theory we'll only count 30% of calls as leads.

column21:
The branded campaign has a high budget but it's not spending the actual amount. 

It happens the same for a little on "Boarding Search Campaign - Exact" and similar to branded in dimension on "Daycare Search Campaign - Exact".

New Customers PMAX set to Bid Higher for new customers not Only New Customers. 

Meta we'll start with blended campaigns for Training and Boarding based on the ads, to later drill down on specific vertical campaigns. On Meta we're testing 2 funnels (Calls and Calls&WebLead) to understand KPIs and benchmarks of performance. 

There are some campaigns that we will mantain but with changes in configuration to leverage their track record and history in the algorythm.
